frontmatter.title: Categorical structure in theory of arithmetic

mainmatter.p: In this paper, we provide a categorical analysis of the arithmetic theory I \Sigma _1. We will provide a categorical proof of the classical result that the provably total recursive functions in I \Sigma _1 are exactly the primitive recursive functions. Our strategy is to first construct a coherent theory of arithmetic \mathbb{T}, and prove that \mathbb{T} presents the initial coherent category equipped with a parameterized natural number object. This allows us to derive the provably recursive total functions in \mathbb{T} are exactly the primitive recursive ones, and establish some other constructive properties about \mathbb{T}. We also sho that \mathbb{T} is exactly the \Pi _2-fragment of I \Sigma _1, and conclude that they have the same class of provably total recursive functions.

frontmatter.title: 2023-10-05 / higher duploid theory: “shut up and calculate”

mainmatter.p: Meeting with Fosco Loregian and Daniele Palombi.
Received an email from Marco Paviotti suggesting a scientific meeting on guarded domain theory in 2024, to be held in Kent.
I had an idea for a potential student project about contractibility; started a page to collect such project ideas.
I remembered to write down a very tasty sauce recipe I invented the other night.

I responded to Yue Niu’s email regarding his research statement. I also responded to Lingyuan Ye, suggesting a meeting next Friday for him to explain his work on the categorical structure in the theory of arithmetic to me.
